name: Invio
description: Invio is a self-hosted invoicing app without the bloat
compose:
name: slashnode-invio
services:
  backend:
    image: ghcr.io/kittendevv/invio-backend:v2.1.1
    container_name: invio-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      ADMIN_USER: admin
      ADMIN_PASS: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      JWT_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      SESSION_TTL_SECONDS: '43200'
      SECURE_HEADERS_DISABLED: 'false'
      ENABLE_HSTS: 'true'
      DATABASE_PATH: /app/data/invio.db
    volumes:
      - backend_data:/app/data
  frontend:
    image: ghcr.io/kittendevv/invio-frontend:v2.1.1
    container_name: invio-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - backend
    environment:
      PORT: '8000'
      BACKEND_URL: http://invio-backend:3000
      COOKIE_SECURE: 'false'
      FRONTEND_SECURE_HEADERS_DISABLED: 'false'
      ENABLE_HSTS: 'false'
      ORIGIN: http://${node.exports.host}:8003
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8003:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  backend_data:
    name: slashnode-invio_backend_data
